locator.quote: Arbs are invisible in the observation.

text: Problem 2: arbs are invisible in the observation — the policy sees only raw prices/spreads and must derive a lockable post-commission arb itself.

locator.quote: to stabilise on within 3 generations — and doubly hard when layer

text: Deriving the arb from raw inputs is a non-trivial transform for an LSTM/transformer to stabilise on within 3 generations — and doubly hard when the value collapse kills exploration first.
